falsification_conditions.condition: The price rises above the 200-day moving average by 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong breakout above key support would contradict the blowoff pattern's typical bearish trajectory, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volatility (measured by the CBOE VIX) drops below 20 (current level: 32) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volatility would refute the blowoff pattern's hallmark of extreme price swings, proving the current call wrong.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5,200 without a subsequent 5% pullback within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained bullish breakout without correction would directly contradict the blowoff pattern's expected crash phase, falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
